description_long: This is a stylized penguin with a plump, oval-shaped white belly and a contrasting black back, head, and flippers. Its face features expressive, wide-set eyes, a prominent orange beak with a slight curve, and a subtle smile. The wings are outstretched horizontally, giving the impression of a classic 'T-pose.' The feet are webbed and orange, with three visible toes on each foot. The overall body is smooth and rounded, with a glossy finish that mimics the sleek, water-resistant feathers of real penguins. The asset is cartoonish in style, with exaggerated facial features and simplified anatomical details.
description: A cartoonish penguin with a white belly, black back, orange beak, and webbed feet, standing upright with outstretched wings. The body is smooth, rounded, and glossy, with expressive facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the penguin's white belly, orange beak, wide-set eyes, and outstretched wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the penguin's curved beak, rounded belly, and the black coloration covering its back and head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid black back, outstretched wings, and the tips of the orange feet visible below.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the beak, belly, and black back.
